ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trail */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the trail */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., easy, moderate, challenging) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the trail */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the trail in miles */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL of the trail image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the trail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the trail was last updated */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Elevation gain of the trail */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., loop, out-and-back, point-to-point) */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the trail (e.g., dirt, gravel, asphalt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level (e.g., easy, moderate, challenging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Broadway, North Carolina) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail the image belongs to */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_tag" TEXT /* Tags for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_images_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hiker, trail administrator, moderator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_tags" TEXT /* Tags for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_saves" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved trail */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail being saved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the trail */,
  "save_date" TEXT /* Date the trail was saved */,
  "save_type" TEXT /* Type of save (e.g., favorite, wishlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_saves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_saves_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the social media account */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the social media account (e.g., Facebook, Instagram, Twitter) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media account */,
  "social_media_token" TEXT /* Social media token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the trail administrator */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail being administered */,
  "administrator_type" TEXT /* Type of administrator (e.g., owner, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_administrators_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the moderator */,
  "moderator_type" TEXT /* Type of moderator (e.g., trail moderator, review moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the review */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the review */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the review was reported */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reports_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
